overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through the urban district of Night City. The player character walks from a covered sidewalk under an overpass, through a busy intersection, and along a street lined with a graffiti-covered retaining wall. The scene features futuristic architecture, holographic advertisements, and moderate pedestrian traffic under clear sunny skies.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway transitioning to open intersection

events.description: exits covered walkway under concrete overpass into open sunlit intersection
approaches crosswalk with traffic lights and passing vehicles

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk under the overpass, then emerging into the open intersection area

notable_agents.action: dark colored car driving along the street parallel to the sidewalk
person in blue shirt and red pants walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: concrete overpass roof providing partial shade over the walkway
modern glass facade building with reflective windows and metal framework
large pink neon advertisement display mounted on building facade

segments.scene_description: The segment begins under a concrete overpass in a covered walkway with a glass building on the right. The camera moves forward, emerging from the shaded area into a bright open intersection with crosswalk markings and traffic lights. Pedestrians walk ahead while cars pass on the left, and holographic advertisements become visible on the buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban commercial street in The Glen district

events.description: UI notification appears indicating entry into 'THE GLEN' district
concrete retaining wall becomes prominent feature on the right side of the path

agents.ego_description: walking along the city street passing various pedestrians and approaching the graffiti-lined corridor

notable_agents.action: person in green tank top and camouflage pants walking toward the camera
group of pedestrians walking along the street in the same direction

entered.detail: tall brown concrete wall running alongside the sidewalk
tall modern street light with orange accent lighting
elevated train or transit bridge spanning across the street ahead

segments.scene_description: Walking through the open urban environment of The Glen district, the scene features mixed commercial buildings and moderate pedestrian traffic. The concrete retaining wall becomes increasingly prominent on the right side while an overhead transit bridge looms ahead. The lighting is bright and direct with clear skies overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban pedestrian walkway alongside graffiti-covered retaining wall

events.description: graffiti murals become denser and more colorful with large skull artwork visible

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk next to the graffiti-covered wall, approaching the overhead bridge structure

notable_agents.action: shirtless pedestrian with tattoos and beige shorts walking ahead on the path
child in bright yellow jacket walking alongside an adult

entered.detail: large white skull face with red details painted on the brown wall
vibrant blue, yellow and white street art murals covering the wall surface

segments.scene_description: The final segment follows the pedestrian walkway alongside a tall retaining wall that becomes increasingly covered in colorful graffiti and street art. The camera approaches the overhead transit bridge while passing various pedestrians walking in the opposite direction. The wall features prominent murals including a large skull design, creating an urban artistic corridor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a shaded urban walkway into a bright, graffiti-lined street corridor in the Glen district. It begins under a concrete overpass beside a glass building, moving forward as the camera emerges from the shadows into a sunlit intersection filled with crosswalks, traffic, and glowing holographic advertisements. As the camera advances through the open urban environment, the bright direct light emphasizes the surrounding commercial buildings and a looming overhead transit bridge. The scene then shifts toward a pedestrian walkway where a concrete retaining wall on the right becomes increasingly covered in colorful street art and murals. Finally, the camera passes oncoming pedestrians while following the artistic corridor toward the transit bridge, with a large skull design dominating the wall.
